reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Muy demanda. Si andas en moto conviene ir con tiempo porque no hay una cola especial para este medio de transporte.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Very popular. If you're on a motorcycle, it's best to arrive early because there's no separate line for this mode of transport.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838589510677516365/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNlAtRTJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una atención muy esmerada, el free-shop bastante bueno, lo único que le tira un poco abajo es que tienen muy pocos surtidores, lo que dificulta el tiempo de espera cuando hay varios clientes.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very attentive, the duty-free shop is quite good, the only thing that brings it down a bit is that they have very few pumps, which makes waiting time difficult when there are several customers.
